creative_direction.reasoning: The entire ad is text plus a thin strip of product UI + mascot row. No hero imagery. Track B is mandatory — the massive headline, blue CTA, and dollar figure must be pixel-perfect. Background only needs the off-white canvas + bottom footer strip (UI thumbnails + 6 mascot faces).
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Dollar-anchored headline dominates, product + mascot footer provides trust layer.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full ad including typography in a single image-gen call.

nano_banana_json.scene: Editorial SaaS ad, flat-lay graphic composition. Off-white canvas with a massive 3-line black sans-serif headline centered upper-third, a bright blue pill CTA below, a small italic tagline below that, and a bottom strip showing miniature Notion product UI screenshots on the left overlapping with a horizontal row of 6 illustrated face mascots on the right.

subject.description: Three-line ExtraBold black sans headline: 'Get up to / $12,000 of / Free Notion'

lighting.style: flat render, no shadows, no depth

vertical_zones: Top 8%: Notion N logo + wordmark, small, centered
Center 58-68%: blue pill CTA 'Free Trial with AI Access' in white sans
Below CTA: italic tagline 'Smart Collaboration Meets AI Automation'
Bottom 25%: left — 2 overlapping Notion product UI thumbnails (Product board + Projects Kanban); right — horizontal row of 6 circular face mascots in Notion's scribble-drawn house style

text_elements_in_image.content:
Get up to
$12,000 of
Free Notion

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Background + bottom footer strip only. All text composited in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Off-white #F7F7F5 canvas 1080x1080 with a small Notion N logo + wordmark centered in the top 8% and a bottom 25% footer strip.
nano_banana_json.footer_strip_content: Left half: 2 small rounded-corner Notion product UI thumbnails (one showing 'Product' database with status columns, one showing 'Projects' kanban with Not started/In progress/Done columns) overlapping at slight angles. Right half: horizontal row of 6 round (circular) illustrated face mascots drawn in Notion's scribble house style — each ~80px diameter, distinct expressions (checkmark eyes, pencil hair, book, flower, cowboy hat) in Notion's orange/pink/yellow/blue/red palette, all with simple black line faces.
negative_prompt: no text in upper and middle zones

elements.content:
Get up to
$12,000 of
Free Notion

assets.name: Notion N logo + wordmark
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Small geometric black-and-white 'N' icon with subtle 3D paper-fold, next to 'Notion' wordmark in ExtraBold sans, total ~40px tall, top-center.

assets.name: Notion illustration mascot row (6 characters)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Six circular face mascots drawn in Notion's proprietary scribble-line-art house style: flat pastel backgrounds (yellow, orange, blue, pink, red, tan), simple black line faces, one with checkmark eyes, one with pencil, one with blue square-eyes, one with flower crown, one reading a book, one wearing a cowboy hat. Each ~80px, arranged in a single horizontal row.

assets.name: Product UI thumbnails
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Two small Notion UI database screenshots: a 'Product' board with status columns (Planning, In progress, Complete) and a 'Projects' kanban with 'Not started', 'In progress', 'Done' columns. Legible but tiny.

prompt_writer_training_notes: Ad is 85% typography — always Track B. Key move: the three-line headline needs a specific line_height (0.95) and letter_spacing (-0.02em) to match Notion's visual weight; without these, default sans falls apart. Mascot row is hard for image gen — composite from brand kit unless verified. Off-white (#F7F7F5) is deliberately warmer than pure white — reads as editorial, not clinical.
